name: Bloodfeeding Crystal
description: This weapon has a blood-red tint. Every time a bloodfeeding weapon deals damage to a living creature, it gains 1 blood point, which it can store for up to 1 hour. The weapon can store a maximum of 10 blood points. This effect is continuous and requires no activation. When you deal damage to a creature while wielding a bloodfeeding weapon, you can activate the weapon to spend up to 5 stored blood points. Each blood point you spend in this way deals an extra 2 points of damage to that creature. The weapon doesn't gain any blood points from a strike on which you use this ability.
unidentifiedDesc: A blood-red tinted weapon augmentation crystal.
